titleStmt.title: SII 9.258: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 258. (A.R. No. 88 of 1904.) ON THE 4TH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: It is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 16, Āṅgiras, Phālguṇa, paurṇamāse, Sōmavāra, Vyatīpāta. Chāḷukya-Vikrama-varsha 16 seems to be a mistake, for in that year Jagadēkamalla to whose reign the record refers itself could not be ruling. If it is a mistake for Jagadēkamalla-varsha 16, the date would correspond to A.D. 1153 February 9, Monday; f.d.t. ·79. The record states that Vikramādityarasa, uncle of Jagadēkamalla-Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva, gave to the Brāhman Mahājanas of Bāguḷi gadyāṇas 173, with the stipulation that with the interest thereon 13 Brāhmans of the temple of Kalidēva should be given provisions and 2 lamps should be burnt before the gods Kalidēva and Narasiṁhadēva. The gift was made for the merit of Sōvaladēvī, Vikramādityarasa and his wife Nāgiyāṇḍeyarasi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁnamaḥ śaṁkarāya . pūjyānāmapi pūjyāya vēdhasāmapi vēdhasē samaṁ ca
turmmukhīgītabrahmaṇē brahmaṇē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . gaṇapata
yē namaḥ .
cūḍāpīḍakapāḷasaṁkuḷagaḷanmaṁdākinīvārayō vidyullōlalalāṭalōcanapuṭajyōtirvi
miśratviṣaḥ . pāṁtu tvāmakaṭhōrakētakaśikhāsaṁdigdhamugdhēndavō bhūtēśasya bhu
jaṁgavallivaḷayasraṅnaddha jūṭājaṭāḥ . namastasmai varāhāya līlayā
caratō mahīṁ . khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇakhaṇāya
tē . jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvā rāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrā
graviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . © svasti samastabhuva
nāśraya śīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalla
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda ma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yadvaṁsāṁbaradyumaṇi śubhaṭacūḍā
maṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ
śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādābjabhaiṁgaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmajjagadē
kamallavīrapāṇḍyadēvara māvaṁ vikramādityarasaru śrīmaccāḷukyavikra
makālada 16 neyāṁgirasaṁvatsarada phālguṇada paurṇnamāse sōma
vāraṁ vyatīpātadaṁdu yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇa
pārāyaṇajapahōmasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu hariścaṁ
dradattiyagrahāraṁ bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁgaḷa
yvadiṁbargge koḷagavāhiyāgi poṁge varṣakke Ippaṇavṛddhiyalu koṇḍa gadyāṇaṁ nūṟa
Erppattamūṟu Intī ponnabaḍḍiyiṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvara sthaḷakka naḍeyisuva dharma brāhma
ṇaru hanneraḍu Avarigaṭṭikkuvavarorbbaru Antu hadimūṟu manuṣya
rggaṁ nellakki koḷaga 1 baḷḷa 1 Endirumānaṁ 2 tuppa māna 1 soḷasa Āḷe baḷḷa 3 bā
ḍu kāyge vīsa 1 Aḍake 25 Ele 50 Aḍugarbbu tiṁgaḷiṁge baṇḍi 1 śrīkalidēvara nandādī
vige Eraḍakkaṁ devasakke Eṇne soḷasaṁ 3 Ā dēvargge puṟpa nūṟu śrīnarasiṁhadēvara naṁ
dādīvige Eraḍakkaṁ Eṇne soḷasaṁ 3 Ī dharmmadoḷage śrīkalidēvaralli Ondu nandādīvigeyaṁ
nūṟupuṟpada śrīnarasiṁhmadēvaralli Oṁdu nandādīvige yintininataṟa phalamuṁ śrīsōva
ladēviyargge mattaṁ śrīkalidēvaralli Ondu nandādīvigeya śrīnarasiṁ
hadēvaralli Ondu nandādīvigeyintī phalamuṁ (.) śrīvikramādityarasargge brāhmaṇa
bhōjanadoḷage Āṟu manuṣyara bhōjanada phalaṁ vikramādityarasarattegaḷu kēta
bbarasiyargge mattavāṟu manuṣya brāhmaṇabhōjanada phalaṁ vikramādityarasara mada
vaḷige nāgiyāṁḍeyarasiyargge Intī dharmmamanayvadiṁbaruṁ taṁtamma triśuddhiyiṁ
dācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍayisuvarī dharmmamaṁ devasakke yyalu tiṁgaḷigoThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
